critical_data_description: Free text description of the critical data item as it is described in the critical data item list
critical_data_item_type: type of critical data item (response options: stratification_variable / primary_outcome / secondary_outcome)
critical_data_item: Free text description of the critical data item
event_names: event name as it appears in REDCap, multiple values separated by a semicolon
field_name: field name as it appears in REDCap
variable_type: type of variable (response options: cateogrical / continuous)
multivariate_yn: is the variable linked to any other variables (e.g. is the variable one question in a licensed questionnaire? Or one variable in a liver function panel?) (response options: y / n)
multivariate_group: if the previous value is y, give the multivariate group a name (e.g. eq5d5l). If there are multiple groups, sepearate them using a semicolon
required_yn: is the field required (response options: y / n)

critical_data_item: Child Pugh score from screening: 7-9 (moderate) and 10+ (severe)

critical_data_description: Liver Frailty Index (LFI) change at 12-weeks post baseline
critical_data_item: Hand grip strength (3 attempts and mean)
